# Pareto

> Lightweight React SSR framework with streaming, file-based routing, and built-in state management.

Pareto is an open-source React server-side rendering framework built on Vite 7. It provides SSR with streaming via defer() and Suspense, file-based routing (page.tsx, layout.tsx, error.tsx, head.tsx conventions), built-in state management powered by Immer, SSG support, error boundaries, redirect/404 handling, resource routes for JSON APIs, and per-route head management.

## Key APIs

- `useLoaderData()` — Access data from the route's loader function
- `defer({ sync, async: promise })` — Return deferred data for streaming
- `<Await resolve={promise} fallback={<Skeleton />}>` — Render streamed data
- `defineStore((set) => ({ ... }))` — Create reactive stores with Immer mutations
- `throw redirect('/path')` — Redirect in loaders
- `throw notFound()` — Trigger 404 in loaders
- `export const config = { render: 'static' }` — Mark page for SSG

## File Conventions

- `page.tsx` — Route component
- `layout.tsx` — Wrapping layout (nests)
- `error.tsx` — Error boundary (bubbles up)
- `head.tsx` — Per-route title and meta tags
- `not-found.tsx` — 404 page
- `route.ts` — Resource route (JSON API, no HTML)

## Documentation Pages

- Introduction: https://paretojs.tech/guides/introduction/
- Quick Start: https://paretojs.tech/guides/quick-start/
- Streaming SSR: https://paretojs.tech/concepts/streaming/
- File-Based Routing: https://paretojs.tech/concepts/routing/
- State Management: https://paretojs.tech/concepts/state-management/
- Static Site Generation: https://paretojs.tech/concepts/ssg/
- Error Handling: https://paretojs.tech/concepts/error-handling/
- Head Management: https://paretojs.tech/concepts/head-management/
- Redirects: https://paretojs.tech/concepts/redirects/
- Resource Routes: https://paretojs.tech/concepts/resource-routes/
- API Reference (Core): https://paretojs.tech/api/core/
- API Reference (Store): https://paretojs.tech/api/store/
- Configuration: https://paretojs.tech/api/config/
